tips_en: Start with SEED (Paper 2) as it tackles a fundamental challenge in agentic RL—dense supervision over long interaction histories—through an elegant self-evolving framework, and read SearchOS (Paper 3) immediately after since both address complementary aspects of long-horizon agentic systems: SEED focuses on token-level learning from trajectory feedback, while SearchOS externalizes interaction state into durable infrastructure to prevent context loss and repetitive loops. VideoChat3 (Paper 1) is best read separately, as it operates in the orthogonal multimodal efficiency domain, though its emphasis on compression and reproducibility shares a design philosophy with the other two.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 SEED（论文2），它通过自演化框架解决了智能体强化学习中长交互历史下的密集监督这一基础性难题；随后立即阅读 SearchOS（论文3），因为两篇论文都聚焦于长程智能体系统的不同侧面——SEED 关注从轨迹反馈中进行 token 级学习，而 SearchOS 则将交互状态外部化为持久化基础设施，以防止上下文丢失和重复搜索循环。VideoChat3（论文1）适合单独阅读，它属于多模态效率领域，但其强调压缩和可复现性的设计理念与前两篇论文有相通之处。
